titleStmt.title: SII 16.223: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 223. (A.R. No. 807 of 1922.) VAṄGIPURAM, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the Garuḍa pillar set up in front of the temple of Vallabharāya.
This is dated Śaka 1478, Piṅgaḷa, Śrāvaṇa ba. 8. If the Śaka year quoted is a mistake for 1479, the details correspond to 1557 A.D., August 17, (Tuesday).

It refers to the construction of the mukha-maṇḍapa and the eastern gōpura of the temple of Śrīvallabharāya at Vaṅgipuram in the Koṇḍavīṭi-sīma and records grant of land made to it by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla Kuruchēṭi Mūrttirājayyadēvachōḍa-mahārāja, who was a subordinate of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Yaradirumalarājayyadēva-mahārāju. The god is described as the lord of Ahichchatrapuri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāya
namaḥ . svastiśrījayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa
ṁbulu 1478 Agunēṁṭi piṁ
gaḷa saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8 lu
kāsyapagōtra Āpastaṁbasū
tra yajuśśākhādhyāyulayi
na śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Apra
tīkamalla kuricēṭi mummaḍirāja
yyavāri pautralayina rāghavarā
jayyavāri putrulayina mū
rttirājayyadēvacōḍamahā
rājuluṁgāru kauśikagōtra
kātyāyanasūtra śuklayajuśśā
khādhyāyulayina rūpaneguṁṭla
kṛṣṇayaṁgāri pautralayina ti
rumalayaṁgāri putrulayina
vōbhaḷayaṁgārikinni kāsyapagō
tra kātyāyanasūtra śuklayeju
śśākhādhyāyulayina maṁdaḍapu
Aubaḷayaṁgāri pautralayina
rāmayaṁgāri puttrulayina
Aubhaḷayaṁgārikinni kāsyapagō
tra kātyāyanasūtra śuklayaju
śśākhādhyāyulayina maṁdaḍapu
rāmayaṁgāri pautrulayina ja
gannādhayaṁgāri putrulayina
tirumalayaṁgārikinni kāsyapagō
tra kātyāyanasūtra śuklayajuśśā
khādhyāyulayina maṁdaḍapu tiru
malayaṁgāri pautrulayina Au
bhaḷayaṁgāri putralayina veṁ
gaḷayarāmayaṁgā
rikinni Iccina bhūdānadharmma
śāsanakramameṭlannanu śrī
madrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīsadāśivarāyadēvama
hārāyaluṁgāru vidyā
nagaramaṁddu ratnaśiṁhāsa
nārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāmrājya
mu sēyucunnuvuṁḍḍaṁgānu śrī manma
hāmaṁḍḍalēśvara rāmarāju yaradiruma
larājayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru
mā nāyaṁkkarānaku pāliṁcci Iyya
navadhariṁccina koṁḍavīṭiśīmalōnu vaṁ
ggipuragrāmānanu Ahichatrapurīnāthaṁ
mahīnāthaṁ mahīdharaṁ . Aihikāmuṣmikā
dhamahaṁ vaṁddē ca vallabhaṁ . vaṁdē vaṁggipurī
nāthaṁ sālagrāmaśilōdbhavaṁ . suvarnabiṁ
bara(ṁ)myāṁggaṁ suvarnnacchāyasannibhaṁ
bhūsurai
puṁḍarīkākṣaṁ kēśavaṁ karuṇānidhiṁ . śrīma
danaṁttakōṭibraṁhmāṁḍḍanāyakuṁḍaina
vaṁggipurapu śrīvallabharāyani mukhamaṁ
dapaṁ tūrpudvāraṁ yērpparaśi
ni pratiṣṭhanuśēśi
namahotsavaṁnnu
navadhariṁccina vuṁ
yiṁddu vallabha The rest of the
Digital edition of SII 16.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
